news.title: Elon Musk unveils chip manufacturing plans for SpaceX and Tesla
news.snippet: Elon Musk recently outlined ambitious plans for a chip-building collaboration Tesla and SpaceX — but he has a history of overpromising.

news.title: Delve accused of misleading customers with ‘fake compliance’
news.snippet: An anonymous Substack post accuses compliance startup Delve of “falsely” convincing “hundreds of customers they were compliant” with privacy and security regulations.

news.title: Musk says he’s building Terafab chip plant in Austin, Texas

news.title: AI was everywhere at gaming’s big developer conference — except the games

news.title: An exclusive tour of Amazon’s Trainium lab, the chip that’s won over Anthropic, OpenAI, even Apple
news.snippet: Shortly after Amazon  announced its $50 billion investment in OpenAI, AWS invited me on a private tour of the chip lab at the heart of the deal.

news.title: Are AI tokens the new signing bonus or just a cost of doing business?
news.snippet: Maybe tokens really will become the fourth pillar of engineering compensation. But engineers might want to hold the line before embracing this as a straightforward win.

news.title: Publisher pulls horror novel ‘Shy Girl’ over AI concerns
news.snippet: Hachette Book Group said it will not be publishing “Shy Girl” over concerns that artificial intelligence was used to generate the text.

news.title: Why Wall Street wasn’t won over by Nvidia’s big conference
news.snippet: Despite investor fears of an AI bubble, Nvidia's latest conference shows that most in the industry aren't concerned by that possibility.

news.title: The gen AI Kool-Aid tastes like eugenics

news.title: Gemini task automation is slow, clunky, and super impressive

news.title: Microsoft rolls back some of its Copilot AI bloat on Windows
news.snippet: The company is reducing Copilot entry points on Windows, starting with Photos, Widgets, Notepad, and other apps.

news.title: Trump takes another shot at dismantling state AI regulation
news.snippet: The Trump administration on Friday unveiled its new legislative blueprint for AI regulation, and the seven-point plan includes a clear message: The federal government should avoid many AI regulations

news.title: WordPress.com now lets AI agents write and publish posts, and more
news.snippet: New AI agents on WordPress.com could lower barriers to publishing while increasing machine-generated content across the web.

news.title: Trump’s AI framework targets state laws, shifts child safety burden to parents
news.snippet: Trump’s AI framework pushes federal preemption of state laws, emphasizes innovation, and shifts responsibility for child safety toward parents while laying out lighter-touch rules for tech companies.

news.title: Google Search is now using AI to replace headlines

news.title: Amazon is making an Alexa phone

news.title: The best AI investment might be in energy tech
news.snippet: Power has become one of the biggest bottlenecks in rolling out new AI data centers. That's creating an opening for investors.

news.title: These AI notetaking devices can help you record and transcribe your meetings
news.snippet: These physical notetakers transcribe audio and give users summaries and action items of meetings using AI. Some even offer live translation.

news.title: OpenAI is planning a desktop ‘superapp’

news.title: Jeff Bezos reportedly wants $100 billion to buy and transform old manufacturing firms with AI
news.snippet: The Amazon magnate has a new project centered around acquiring industrial firms and revamping them with AI technology.
